name: »》KARL《«
description:
There's a snowstorm, so you huddle for warmth.

♡-______________________________________-♡

There was a snowstorm outside,

And no way of warming up,

So you huddle for warmth.

REQUESTED? YES!

Gave my own little take on it and did a whole lot of research since I don't think there would be a random snow storm in Kaub—

I really really love this game, thx for the two requests on my favorite character of all time in this game.. Karl we love you we all scream in unison

Kinda stern Karl supremacy

I made a g&b oc want a bot of him......

Ughhh I made him so cute ngl I'm gonna cry tears of joyyyy
